title: UnDercontrol Board Resource
description: Schema for Kanban board YAML resource files. Boards organize tasks into columns with optional query filters and auto-actions.

board_type.description: private: shows all accessible tasks. shared: shows only tasks shared with the board's group.

columns.description: Ordered list of columns. Order in the array determines display order.

default_tags.description: Tags automatically applied to tasks created in this board.

query.description: SQL-like filter query for tasks in this column (e.g., 'status:todo', 'status:in-progress AND tag:urgent').

actions.description: Auto-actions triggered when tasks enter or exit the column.

trigger.description: When to fire: 'enter' when task moves into column, 'exit' when task leaves.

value.description: Value to set on the field.

example.description:
Example board YAML:

apiVersion: ud/v1
kind: Board
spec:
  name: Sprint Board
  board_type: private
  default_tags: [sprint-1]
  columns:
    - name: Backlog
      query: "status:todo"
    - name: In Progress
      query: "status:in-progress"
      actions:
        - trigger: enter
          field: status
          value: in-progress
    - name: Review
      query: "status:pending"
      actions:
        - trigger: enter
          field: status
          value: pending
    - name: Done
      query: "status:done"
      actions:
        - trigger: enter
          field: status
          value: done
